nasb.text: If, however, a man acts presumptuously toward his neighbor, so as to kill him craftily, you are to take him even from My altar, that he may die.

esv.text: But if a man willfully attacks another to kill him by cunning, you shall take him from my altar, that he may die.

cnv.text: 若有人任意待他的鄰舍，用詭計把他殺了，你要把他從我的祭壇那裡拿去處死。

ccb.text: 倘若是蓄意杀人，就算他逃到我的祭坛那里，也要把他拉出来处死。
